data.content: I'll start `dotnet watch test` which will automatically re-run your tests whenever you save a file.

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

data.reasoningText:
The user wants to use `dotnet watch test` for hot reload. This is a .NET MSTest project. I can start `dotnet watch test` which will re-run tests automatically when files change.

Let me start it up.

data.content:
`dotnet watch test` is now running. Here's the status:

- ✅ `CalculateShipping_StandardDelivery_Returns5` — passed
- ❌ `CalculateShipping_ExpressDelivery_Returns15` — **failed**: expected `15.00` but `CalculateShipping("express", ...)` returns `10.00`

The watcher is live — it will re-run tests automatically whenever you save a file. The fix for the failing test is in `ShippingCalculatorTests.cs` line 23: the `"express"` case returns `10.00m` instead of `15.00m`. Want me to fix it?
